calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Saul Martin Ferster, Esq. 863-2678, appearing for plaintiff Unity Homes, Inc.
Joan Horton appearing in propria persona

Proceeding:
Case assigned to David P. Dawson, Judge pro temp, for settlement conference. Case settled and taken off the trial calendar. Counsel put terms of settlement on the record:
1. This agreement is related to the property known as 1469 Kirkwood Court, S. F.
2. Defendant agrees to keep Herbert Bell, her grandson, off the premises. If violated, plaintiff can give 24 hours notice to apply for an ex-parte order for restitution of possession.
3. Each side to bear its own costs.
4. Counsel for plaintiff will prepare a written stipulation within 10 days.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2004 Off Calendar
